findings.title: Hardcoded database and SMTP credentials
findings.description: Database host, username, password, SMTP host, and SMTP password stored as static const string variables

findings.title: Database credentials leaked in error response
findings.description: Report generation handler constructs error response containing database host, username, and password

findings.title: Debug endpoint exposes full user records including passwords
findings.description: Debug endpoint constructs JSON response containing all user fields including plaintext password

findings.title: Password reset token and SMTP server returned in API response
findings.description: Password reset token and internal SMTP hostname returned directly in API response

findings.title: Config endpoint exposes all infrastructure credentials
findings.description: Admin config endpoint returns database credentials and SMTP password in API response
